prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-ALUMTENTSTAKES-SILVER-4PC Product Type: ANCHOR_STAKE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 4pk Aircraft Grade Aluminum Screw In Tent Stakes Pegs Ground Anchors Camping Essentials, 9 Inch Description: Holding power, durability, terrain diversity, as well as easy installation and packability, these lightweight but durable 6061 aircraft grade aluminum tent stakes from ASR Outdoor boast it all.

These camping essentials tent stakes come with sharp pointed tips, hooked heads, rust proof aluminum unibody construction with twisted metal design for easy and quick installation. Featuring a lightweight but heavy duty design, these tent stakes feature a single body, 6061 aircraft grade aluminum construction, increasing ground anchor integrity, durability and longevity, as well as making installation and removal efficient. The intention twisted metal body design means no hand tools or hammers are needed, as the tent stakes will screw right into the ground, enhancing stability and grip.

The purposeful lightweight design and material construction make these tent pegs ideal for camping, backpacking, hiking, mountaineering and more, as they won’t weigh your gear down in comparison to other heavier tent stakes.

Reliable and robust, these aluminum tent stakes can handle everything from multi person camping tents, tarp tie downs, landscaping projects, overhead installations for sporting events and much more; they’re suitable for use in dirt, sand, gravel and grassy terrains, giving you a diverse selection of ground anchoring possibilities.

Reach for these lightweight and incredibly sturdy tent stakes from ASR Outdoor come your next camping trip or backcountry adventure!

Dimensions: 9 x 1.5 x 0.25 inches

4pk Tent Stakes Weight: 0.22lbs Search Terms: basic tent stake; cheap tent pegs; replacement camping stake; anchor stake; lightweight ground stake Features: - CAMPING ESSENTIALS: ASR Outdoor aircraft grade 6061 aluminum tent feature unibody construction, making them a reliable choice to ensure camping tents are firmly secured; the pegs feature sharp tips, hooked heads and twisted drill rust proof design for quick installation, no hand tools needed - UNIBODY CONSTRUCTION: Lightweight but heavy duty, these aluminum tent stakes are made from tough 6061 aircraft grade aluminum, increasing the ground anchors integrity, durability and longevity; the twisted metal body design means no hammers are needed and are ready to screw right into the ground - MULTIPURPOSE GROUND ANCHOR: Whether setting up a camping tent, overhead canopy, for landscaping, tarp tie downs or for sporting events or other, these rust proof aircraft grade aluminum tent stakes can handle it all; suitable for use in grass, dirt, gravel and sand terrains - GREAT FOR TRAVEL: Purposeful lightweight design and material construction make these tent pegs, tent stakes or ground anchors ideal for camping, backpacking, hiking, mountaineering and more, as their design won’t weigh you or your gear down - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 9 x 1.5 x 0.25 inches; Weight: 0.22lbs; Color: Silver === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-pk 9 Inch Silver Aluminum Tent Stakes

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-pk 9 in Silver Aluminum Screw In Tent Stakes

anthropic.title_differentiation: Aircraft Grade 6061 Aluminum, Screw-In Design, Rust Proof, Lightweight, Multipurpose Ground Anchors

openai.title_differentiation: 6061 Aircraft Grade Aluminum, Twisted Screw In Design, Rust Proof, Works In Grass Dirt Gravel And Sand
